SummaryContent: The three boys apologized under the pretense of celebrating Odile's birthday, temporarily reconciling with their parents. But Ezette was suddenly attacked by the Corrupted, and Odile and her husband sacrificed themselves to protect the children.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 9
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui defeats his parents, who have mutated into the Corrupted. He finds the will and solar essence they left behind, absorbs it, and waits for his memory to be restored.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 10
SummaryContent: Ezette was taken over by World Government military forces, and Kamui, along with the other children, was drawn into Project Barleycorn. During the training, tensions flared as a girl named Carol collapsed. Kamui took the initiative to help and calm everyone down. When government official Marlis arrived to persuade Ezette to disband voluntarily, she was refused, only for her to storm off in anger. Leif quietly allowed everyone to take Carol back to the dormitory to rest.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 11
SummaryContent: The trainees cared for Carol in the dormitory while Kamui taught them the traditional Ezette song. Leif sent medicine and supplies for Carol, and the boys remembered his kindness. Shortly after, the modification metrics showed abnormal fluctuations, and the members realized Ezette was about to be ordered to begin relocation operations. Unwilling to be sent to their deaths, they began planning an escape.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 12
SummaryContent: On the run, the trainees were attacked by the Corrupted. Ezette's soldiers rushed to their rescue and sacrificed themselves in the process. After a conflict erupted between the military and the trainees, both sides openly shared their concerns. Following their reconciliation, the military forces led by Leif prepared to carry out the relocation operation themselves. Inspired by Kamui, all trainees volunteered to join in, and Ezette officially launched the relocation operation codenamed Solar Exodus.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 13
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui rushes to the communications room and discovers Marlis holding the Ezette survivors hostage. She massacres them all and declares she will put Kamui to the test, offering him a chance to rescue Carol in exchange.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 13
SummaryContent: The battle ends with Marlis taking Carol's life and taunting Kamui that he is not the true Golden Sun and cannot save his own family. Kamui rushes to the essence storage room, Ezette's last line of defense, recalling the same crisis the base faced years ago.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 14
SummaryContent: In a flashback, Kamui and two others tracked down Kai, who had fled, and brought him back to Ezette. During the training, the group discussed Project Barleycorn's current bottleneck: the modifications had stalled, and an increasing number of members were becoming "failed products," known as Sunspots. For that reason, Kamui pushed himself too far and collapsed. Leif consoled the boys, and Azael followed up by contacting Marlis again, searching for a workable solution.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 15
SummaryContent: Ezette received a distress signal from a research facility and, after conducting reconnaissance, launched a rescue operation. However, the team was ambushed by overwhelming Corrupted forces and ended up trapped for days. When the Sunspot members led by Kai realized they still could help, they chose to drain their own essence to power Kamui and the others, sacrificing themselves so their friends could live.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 15
SummaryContent: As a result, Kamui, Azael, and Catrayv achieved a breakthrough, but it came at the sacrifice of most of their friends. Young Kamui was overwhelmed by grief, having gained power at such a brutal cost, and realized this was not the outcome he had ever truly hoped for.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 16
SummaryContent: Back in the present, Kamui is convinced that he isn't the true Golden Sun, but at least Azael and Catrayv are still alive. He leads the commandant to the essence storage room, expecting to reunite with his family, only to open the door and find his home reduced to ruins.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 17
SummaryContent: Inside, Kamui discovers Catrayv's final message. Unable to survive Marlis' assault, Catrayv entrusted Kamui with the last remaining solar essence. At once, massive waves of Corrupted and Hetero-Creatures surge in. During the retreat, the commandant is gravely wounded protecting Kamui, plunging him once again into guilt and despair.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 18
SummaryContent: Twenty years later, humanity's defenses steadily collapse, driving a retreat back to the surface Ezette base. The commandant finally succumbs to lingering injuries and their aftereffects. Kamui is engulfed by despair, but to keep his promise to protect humanity, he numbs his feelings and forces himself to continue rescuing survivors.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 19
SummaryContent: During a routine patrol, Kamui receives a distress signal from three children. He races to save them, but is killed when the area collapses into ruins. As flames devour his surroundings, his fading consciousness fights to stay alive, helped by the M.I.N.D. anchors set by Strike Hawk and his connection to the commandant. When he regains awareness, he breaks the illusion and attacks the approaching figure of "Catrayv," calling out Azael's name.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 20
SummaryContent: Back in reality, Kamui sees through Azael's disguise and confronts him. Azael insists Kamui must be fused into him, just like every family member he slaughtered. Kamui refuses without hesitation, and their fight erupts. As they battle, the two revisit the defining moment that tore them apart.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 21
SummaryContent: Once again, the trio found themselves trapped at the same impasse. Their investigation revealed genetic defects within them, an answer that shattered Ezette into despair. Kamui was devastated, but unwilling to give up, and he vowed to keep searching for a way to save his family. Azael, overwhelmed by hopelessness, turned to Marlis and the Punishing Virus, sealing Ezette's doom.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 22
SummaryContent: Kamui's application to the World Government finally went through, but before it could be acted on, a transformed Azael shattered the peace. With his own hands, he slaughtered every member of their family to fuse them as one, leaving Kamui as the only one able to escape. Ever since, Azael had waited, using this moment to spring a trap: luring Kamui to his death and trying to complete his vision of unity for their family.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 23
SummaryContent: In the present, Kamui and Azael clash, each holding to their convictions. Kamui's resilience and unshakable resolve unsettle Azael, but Azael admits there's no way back for him now. Still, Kamui steadies himself for the chase, determined to use his own strength to give them all the release they need.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 23
SummaryContent: After his defeat, Azael learns what happened from that application years ago, realizing he was the one who crushed Ezette's rising hope with his own hands. Reflecting on Ezette's core creed brings Azael to full clarity, and he decides to end his own life to ensure Kamui's success.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 24
SummaryContent: After Azael's death, Kamui sinks into melancholy, but confiding in the commandant helps him rediscover clarity in his convictions and ideals. At last, he comes to terms with Ezette's past and departs alongside Strike Hawk. Going forward, he will carry the hopes of his entire family and companions—past and present—pushing ahead with unwavering resolve.

Title: The Dying Sun: Chapter 25
SummaryContent: After returning to Babylonia, Kamui brings back the Family Day tradition. He claims they're recording their first Family Day video while goofing around with Strike Hawk as usual. Nikola and Hassen examine the device Kamui brought back and uncover F.O.S.-related clues. Meanwhile, aboard the F.O.S. starship, Vanessa and her team face a worsening crisis.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 1
SummaryContent: In the second year after the Punishing Virus outbreak, young Lucia takes Luna out to hunt geese. But when Lucia lifts one of the dead birds, its body suddenly changes into a form she knows all too well...

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 1
SummaryContent: After the F.O.S. starship disappears, Asimov receives an abnormal audio signal and sends the Commandant to investigate the old F.O.S. site on the surface.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 2
SummaryContent: After the F.O.S. starship disappears, Luna detects constant interference in the Ascension-Network. Alpha follows the anomaly and leaves alone. Meanwhile, the Commandant and Lucia are sent to investigate the old F.O.S. site on the surface. At Prism Square, they meet Alpha, who has followed the same trail. Then a sudden wave of dense fog swallows all three of them.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 3
SummaryContent: In the Fog, the F.O.S. starship has been trapped for 21 days. Supplies are gone. Communications are down. Strange creatures continue to pour out of the rifts. Vanessa leads the survivors in holding the safe zone. Students grow stronger in battle. Instructors stand firm against despair. This starship once carried humanity's hope. Now, it's like an insect sealed in amber.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 4
SummaryContent: The Commandant and Lucia wake in the Fog and find themselves aboard the missing F.O.S. starship. At the edge of the safe zone, Vanessa detects three green signals: Alpha, Lucia, and the Commandant. Their identities are confirmed, and Vanessa begins explaining the ship's situation. Then a fourth signal appears on the tactical radar, in the exact same location as "Chimera," the creature behind the disaster.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 5
SummaryContent: Chimera's scream tears through the Fog, and waves of monsters surge toward the safe zone. Instructor Lester falls. The F.O.S. flag goes down. Alpha senses Chimera's sorrow and goes to face her alone. Though wounded, Vanessa continues to command support for the communication tower. As long as the tower stands and the distress signal keeps transmitting, there is still hope of reaching Babylonia.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 6
SummaryContent: Deep in the Fog, Chimera carries the out-of-control [Crown], her memories in disarray as she searches the endless mist for her "old friends." A massive rift opens beside the communication tower. Valen's teammates all give their lives. He fights to connect Babylonia's channel to Vanessa's terminal, then leaps down and detonates the explosives, protecting the tower with his life.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 7
SummaryContent: Communication is restored. In the brief window they have, Asimov explains the conditions for returning: activate the deep-space beacon inside the F.O.S. Monument, then restart the main engine. Elsewhere, Alpha chases after Chimera as it runs in pain. A battle is about to begin.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 7
SummaryContent: Despair envelops the safe zone. Student Nia steps forward to raise morale. She lifts the F.O.S. flag and charges into battle. In the Fog, Alpha catches up to Chimera. Chimera speaks the name "Lucia." Before Alpha can recover from the shock, Chimera pulls her into an embrace, and together they fall into the depths of the Fog.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 8
SummaryContent: Chaotic fragments of memory flood Alpha's M.I.N.D. Among the familiar paths, she sees a blurred "starting point."

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 9
SummaryContent: The 21st exploration of the Hetero Tower ends in failure. The Vanguard comes so close, but still falls short. Dominik disappears. Chaos Contamination remains. The world is not saved; instead, it falls into an even deeper disaster. In the ruined wasteland, the Vanguard finds the only survivor: a small child named "Lucia." They bring her back to the last research facility.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 10
SummaryContent: When Lucia was young, her parents were often absent, so she raised her little sister on her own until Chaos Contamination arrived. The Vanguard holds a meeting and decides to move forward with Project String: developing Sefirah technology and sending it to other worlds. It is Dominik's final hope. At the base, Lucia quietly helps the adults with daily tasks, bringing a touch of home to the cold facility. At night, Leora tells her stories about starlight: heroes who became light and flew to other planets to carry the flame, and the last, smallest hero, Alpha.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 11
SummaryContent: Chris' Chaos Contamination erupts, and he returns to the base in a mutated form on Lucia's birthday. Nemo is forced to kill him. At the same time, development of the Sefirah is finally complete, and the Vanguard prepares to set out and deliver it.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 12
SummaryContent: Leora says goodbye to Lucia, and Lucia obediently agrees to stay at the base and wait. But just before Leora leaves, Lucia finally says what she has been afraid of all along. The two embrace and cry together. Then the Vanguard leaves with the Sefirah, and Lucia is left alone to guard the base.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 13
SummaryContent: In the empty base, Lucia tries to live strongly in her own way. She tends the dandelions, maintains the facilities, and fights off monsters. As time passes, the base falls little by little. Lucia is forced to the top floor, but the Vanguard never returns. In the end, she sets out alone, carrying the sacrifices of the adults and holding the "Sefirah" close...

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 14
SummaryContent: Lucia is born into a new world and grows up with a happy childhood. Still, she dreams of the Fog from her past life, and of the people she lost. She resolves to become stronger so she can protect others. Sixteen years later, Dominik establishes F.O.S. Military Command College. Lucia passes the selection and becomes part of its first class. At the opening ceremony, she watches Dawn-III launch into the sky and meets her classmates Joanne and 【kuroname】.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 15
SummaryContent: In the holographic exercise after the first week of school, Lucia and 【kuroname】 serve as opposing team leaders. Their fierce match ends in a draw, and both of them stubbornly get back on their feet. For the first time in a long while, Lucia feels happy. She has finally found someone who can stand as her equal.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 16
SummaryContent: F.O.S. College's Airborne Command Post was hijacked midair during one of its rotation training flights to the ground. At the critical moment, Lucia, 【kuroname】, and Joanne work together, with help from their classmates, to stop the hijackers.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 17
SummaryContent: During her year at F.O.S., the familiar nightmares still return. But this time, Lucia has more companions: 【kuroname】, Joanne, Ophelia, Adelyde, and many others. Through everyday life together, they build deep friendships. On one happy birthday night, her friends celebrate for her under the stars behind the mountain. Lucia makes a wish: that everyone can move safely and happily toward tomorrow.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 18
SummaryContent: During a mission at the lunar base, Lucia and 【kuroname】 open their hearts to each other, with space and Earth as their witnesses... Years later, F.O.S. holds its first graduation ceremony. The first class of students works together on the melody and lyrics, creating F.O.S.'s graduation song, though it never receives an official name.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 19
SummaryContent: After graduation, everyone works toward the future they chose. Lucia and 【kuroname】 also continue to grow closer. On F.O.S.'s anniversary celebration in 2160, Joanne announces that analysis of the [Crown] Sefirah technology is complete. Only two people in the world can fully adapt to it. By chance, those two lovers are each preparing a surprise for the other. Then disaster strikes. Lucia and 【kuroname】 vanish. The remaining F.O.S. students and graduates fight the Corrupted bravely, sacrificing themselves to keep the group moving forward.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 20
SummaryContent: As the Punishing Virus ravages the world, the people of F.O.S. risk everything to reclaim the [Crown] Sefirah. Ophelia, Adelyde, Ms. Cassandra... all teachers and students of F.O.S. die. Within two weeks, the world collapses and sinks into the Fog. Joanne survives until the end and barely manages to stabilize the [Crown], even as her consciousness is slowly eaten away. Much later, Agent One Aisling finds her. To find the companions of this world, Joanne uses Aisling and sets in motion a plan to pull the F.O.S. starship into the Fog.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 21
SummaryContent: As "Chimera" embraces Alpha and they fall together, Alpha sees endless deaths across countless worlds. After that, the consciousness inside "Chimera" is fully consumed by the Fog, leaving only a monster that attacks everything in sight. Badly wounded, Vanessa orders the beacon activated and the main engine restarted. Meanwhile, Lucia, Alpha, and the others are forced to face their former comrades, now driven mad.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 22
SummaryContent: The battle reaches a hopeless moment. Death swallows everyone beyond return. Before their final farewell, Alpha and Lucia share one last, heartfelt conversation. In the end, Lucia refuses to leave Alpha alone in the Fog. She chooses to die first, using the Omega Core's explosion to merge with "Chimera" and pass the [Crown] to Alpha. The will of everyone lost crowns Alpha as king, leaving only a broken ruler in the Fog.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 23
SummaryContent: The new king gains the terrible power to look down upon the world. To understand the Phylotree and the origin of herself, she becomes one with her first self. But after experiencing every happiness in the world, she still chooses to give up her own. She gathers all pain into herself, just to preserve one perfectly happy world, and one perfectly happy Lucia.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 24
SummaryContent: With her mind made up, Alpha begins gathering all the world's suffering and misfortune into herself. She answers Luna's call. She speaks with Vonnegut... With a certain lamb by her side, she slowly comes to understand the Phylotree, Sefirah, the Ascension-Network, and their true nature. But just as everything is complete and she prepares to cross the Gateway, another force pulls her into a promise she should never have forgotten.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 25
SummaryContent: The lamb pulls Alpha back to F.O.S. College's final anniversary celebration. But to protect the future she believes humanity should follow, she has to give up this precious bond. With the universe as witness, she and the Commandant make a vow to never cross paths for eternity. In her pain, Alpha twists the [Crown] Sefirah into [Atheism] and crowns herself.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 26
SummaryContent: Beyond the Gateway, the Merciful One accepts Alpha's choice, and the abandoned ones also embrace the path she has chosen. Alpha hears that nameless graduation song again and finally gives it a name: "Homecoming Voyage." Inspired by the song, she rewinds every tragedy. This time, Lucia doesn't have to die first. The F.O.S. students don't have to die. The Commandant doesn't have to die. With everyone behind her, Alpha charges toward "Vanguard" Chimera. She will lead them all back home.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 27
SummaryContent: The F.O.S. starship breaks through the Fog and returns to Babylonia. Alpha stays behind to guard it until the Commandant is the last to evacuate. Only then does she walk alone into the dark universe, passing by everything she loves.

Title: Homecoming Voyage: Chapter 28
SummaryContent: In a recording that no longer exists, old friends from F.O.S. rushed to offer their blessings. One line still echoes through F.O.S. forever: "All the best to you, Lucia!"
